qa_pairs.question: What is the primary task of the "Adding Data directives" challenge?
qa_pairs.answer: The primary task is to modify the code to use explicit data directives.

qa_pairs.question: Which OpenACC directives can be used for explicit data directives in the challenge?
qa_pairs.answer: You may use either the <tt>kernels</tt> or the <tt>parallel loop</tt> directives.

qa_pairs.question: Where can the solution for the "Adding Data directives" challenge be found?
qa_pairs.answer: The solution is available in the <tt>step2.*</tt> directories from the [https://github.com/calculquebec/cq-formation-openacc Github repository].

qa_pairs.question: How should the compiler flags be adjusted for this challenge?
qa_pairs.answer: You should change your compiler flags to <tt>-ta=tesla</tt> (not managed).

qa_pairs.question: What should be verified after making the code and compiler flag changes in the challenge?
qa_pairs.answer: You should check if you are getting the same results and performance as before.

qa_pairs.question: What is the title of the next unit after this section?
How can one return to the main lesson plan from this section?
qa_pairs.answer: One can return to the lesson plan by clicking the "OpenACC Tutorial" link.
